sqlite3 -json data/canonical.db "with active_records as (select r.* from records r left join identity_aliases ia on ia.kind=r.record_kind and ia.alias=r.record_id where r.record_kind='entity' and ia.alias is null), alias_groups as (select ra.alias as identity_key, count(distinct ra.record_id) as n from record_aliases ra join active_records r on r.record_id=ra.record_id where length(ra.alias)>3 group by ra.alias having n>1) select ag.identity_key, ag.n, json_group_array(json_object('record_id',r.record_id,'display_name',r.display_name,'payload',json(r.payload),'evidence',(select json_group_array(source_id||'#'||block_id) from evidence_refs er where er.record_id=r.record_id))) as records from alias_groups ag join record_aliases ra on ra.alias=ag.identity_key join active_records r on r.record_id=ra.record_id group by ag.identity_key order by ag.n desc, ag.identity_key limit 120;"

commands.result: Confirmed local DB tables include records, corridors, routes, identity_aliases, do_not_merge, evidence_refs, and blocks_fts.

commands.cmd: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select record_kind, count(*) from records where record_kind in ('corridor','route') group by record_kind; select kind, count(*) from identity_aliases where kind in ('corridor','route') group by kind; select kind, count(*) from do_not_merge where kind in ('corridor','route') group by kind;"
commands.result: Found 280 corridor records, 427 route records, 36 corridor aliases, 39 route aliases, 5 corridor do-not-merge rows, and 34 route do-not-merge rows.
Prior Codex prep files through identity090 had corridor/route proposals only for the eight batch090 corridor pairs; none of the batch093 aliases appeared.

commands.cmd: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "with pairs(kind,alias,target) as (...) select p.kind,p.alias,p.target, a.target as existing_alias_target, dn.reason as db_do_not_merge_reason, ra.record_kind as alias_kind, rt.record_kind as target_kind from pairs p left join identity_aliases a on a.kind=p.kind and a.alias=p.alias left join do_not_merge dn on dn.kind=p.kind and ((dn.record_id_a=p.alias and dn.record_id_b=p.target) or (dn.record_id_a=p.target and dn.record_id_b=p.alias)) left join records ra on ra.record_id=p.alias left join records rt on rt.record_id=p.target;"
commands.result: For all 8 proposed pairs, alias and target materialize as the same allowed kind; existing_alias_target and db_do_not_merge_reason were empty.

commands.cmd: jq -r '.aliases.corridor // {}, .aliases.route // {} | to_entries[] | .key + "\t" + (.value|tostring)' data/identity-overrides/merges.json | rg '<batch093 aliases>' || true

commands.cmd: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "with pairs(kind,alias,target) as (...) select p.kind,p.alias,p.target, aa.target as existing_alias_target, dn.reason as db_do_not_merge_reason, ra.record_kind alias_kind, rt.record_kind target_kind from pairs p left join identity_aliases aa on aa.kind=p.kind and aa.alias=p.alias left join do_not_merge dn on dn.kind=p.kind and ((dn.record_id_a=p.alias and dn.record_id_b=p.target) or (dn.record_id_a=p.target and dn.record_id_b=p.alias)) left join records ra on ra.record_id=p.alias left join records rt on rt.record_id=p.target;"

The Finance Committee is a committee of the MTA Board. It is not identical to the parent MTA transit authority.
MTA Construction & Development is a distinct MTA subsidiary/affiliate identity, not the parent MTA authority.
MTA Headquarters is an HQ/administrative unit cluster. It should not collapse into the parent MTA authority solely because HQ appears as an MTA unit.
Janno Lieber is a person/officer; MTA is an organization. The shared Lieber key on the parent cluster is officer-name contamination.
Long Island Rail Road is an MTA subsidiary/railroad entity, not the parent MTA authority.
MTA Risk and Insurance Management is a division/function within MTA, not the parent authority itself.
MTA Real Estate is an agency department/function, not the parent MTA authority. The shared MTA Real Estate aliases on the parent are department contamination.
